{
  "judge_id": "J12345",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identified multiple conceptual issues and proposed a tighter framing, partially supported by the original text. The reframing survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walked the argument chain end-to-end, flagged every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposed minimal repairs.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for some claims but does not provide a comprehensive confidence assessment for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.98,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identified multiple conceptual issues and proposed a tighter framing, partially supported by the original text. The reframing survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walked the argument chain end-to-end, flagged every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposed minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for some claims but does not provide a comprehensive confidence assessment for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason.
